name: Nyaromon

signature_move.name: Baby Bubble
signature_move.description: Puffs up its tail, makes the hairs like wires, and strikes the opponent.

description: A tiny Digimon with cat-like characteristics. It is always capricious, and it seems it was given the name Nyaromon due to how 'cat'-like its behaviour is. Although it is overflowing with curiosity and can be quite fickle, it also has a lonely side. Its Special Move is puffing up its tail, making the hairs like wires and then striking the opponent ( Fox Tail ). However, there has never yet been an opponent observed to flinch from this attack.
